{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "B2B Sales Representative",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Engineering &amp; HVAC Solutions sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: B2B Sales Representative
Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse, Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the B2B Sales Representative, you will drive revenue growth by identifying high-value corporate clients, executing consultative sales strategies, and managing end-to-end sales cycles to build long-term business relationships.


Responsibilities


	Identify and prospect high-value B2B clients through cold outreach, LinkedIn, and professional networks
	Conduct discovery meetings and present tailored solutions to meet client needs
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure
	Build and maintain long-term relationships with corporate clients
	Track sales performance, pipeline health, and provide regular reports on KPIs


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in B2B sales, corporate marketing, or business development
	Experience in HVAC, engineering solutions, or related technical industries is highly preferred
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) and social media tools.


Salary
N500,000 - N700,000 per month.&nbsp;",

B2B Sales Representative Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Engineering & HVAC Solutions sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: B2B Sales Representative
Job Location: Wuse, Abuja (FCT) and Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the B2B Sales Representative, you will drive revenue growth by identifying high-value corporate clients, executing consultative sales strategies, and managing end-to-end sales cycles to build long-term business relationships.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and prospect high-value B2B clients through cold outreach, LinkedIn, and professional networks
	Conduct discovery meetings and present tailored solutions to meet client needs
	Manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to deal closure
	Build and maintain long-term relationships with corporate clients
	Track sales performance, pipeline health, and provide regular reports on KPIs


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in B2B sales, corporate marketing, or business development
	Experience in HVAC, engineering solutions, or related technical industries is highly preferred
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook) and social media tools.


Salary
N500,000 - N700,000 per month.     

    

        Click here to Apply
